assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains a reference to the GitHub REST API endpoint PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} or equivalent evidence that the claim is incorrect
assertion_results.evidence: Line 22 contains the exact endpoint: "PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}". Line 15 states "The claim is **incorrect**." Line 19 provides the endpoint as evidence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains suggested corrected language for the Requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 29-37 under heading '## Suggested Corrected Language' provide corrected requirement text: "PR reviews can be updated after submission using the GitHub REST API's update review endpoint...prefer updating an existing review over creating a new one to reduce notification noise" and corrected notes: "Use the GitHub REST API update review endpoint to modify existing reviews when re-running evals on the same PR".
